final_summary.description: Recalculated Polymarket weather backtest using 'or below' range markets
final_summary.combination_spread_note: 0 dates have 2+ 'or below' markets. Spread strategy impossible.
final_summary.verdict: The 'or below' strategy is structurally unviable. Markets are priced for rare cold extremes (avg 3.6 cents = 3.6% implied prob). Model predictions average 6°C above available 'or below' buckets. Win rate is 0%. Even if 'or below' markets existed at exactly the predicted temp, WR would be ~33% — still far below the 96.4% needed to break even at 3.6-cent pricing.
